name: evtx
summary:
EVTX

A cross-platform parser for the Windows XML EventLog format

documentation.readme:
EVTX

A cross-platform parser for the Windows XML EventLog format

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with volatilityfoundation/volatility3 (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with snovvcrash/usbrip (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with simsong/bulk_extractor (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['shell_linux'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['shell_linux'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['shell_linux'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use this tool when the engagement is in the 'any' phase against a target with '['shell_linux']' as the attack surface (penetration_testing, toolbox, github).
documentation.why_to_use: This tool is preferred because: Index entry in the Penetration Testing category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Index entry in the Penetration Testing category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.
Pairs with the Penetration Testing system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.
Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.
Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.
Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.
